description: Consolidate audit workflows under a deterministic, safety-preserving nine-target /audit dispatcher.

userStories.title: Add the nine-target dispatcher
userStories.description: Create the canonical /audit dispatcher, exact usage, route ownership, trigger matrix, and focused route probe.
acceptanceCriteria: Exactly nine public targets dispatch to one authoritative reference each
Invalid or incomplete invocation prints canonical usage without starting a run
Dispatcher taxonomy probe covers routes, triggers, private helpers, and retained instruments
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build deterministic PR primitives
userStories.description: Implement private focused/queue acquisition plus versioned deterministic classification and exhaustive fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: pr-acquire.sh owns one query per mode and cleans invocation-scoped snapshots
pr-classify.sh is network-free, mutation-free, deterministic JSON-in/JSON-out
Fixtures cover CI enums, review/merge truth tables, drafts, duplicates, unknowns, and byte stability
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Move the implementation gate
userStories.description: Move the existing per-unit gate under /audit implementation and consume focused classifier JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: Gate order and AUDIT-PASS/AUDIT-FAIL tokens remain unchanged
Gate 3 reads machine readiness and evidence fields only
Browser preflight is non-mutating and fail-closed for UI stories
All implementation-gate callers use /audit implementation
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Migrate audit target protocols
userStories.description: Move harness, context, skills, eval-quality, drift, and full campaign protocols without flattening verdicts.
acceptanceCriteria: Each target retains its native verdicts and fail-closed conditions
Full campaign preserves provenance, correlation, tiering, and Recommended Next 3 Actions
External harness mode is report-only by default and issue actions require preview/confirm/dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Unify root run and logging behavior
userStories.description: Implement immutable AUDIT_ROOT/AUDIT_LOG_ROOT/AUDIT_RUN_ID propagation and single-owner logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Direct eval, health-check, and wiki invocations log normally
Composed children suppress logs and one audit invocation appends exactly once
Root/run lifecycle and concurrent temp isolation are fixture-tested
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Harden ablation recovery
userStories.description: Make ablate.sh the single locked versioned swap/restore state machine used by context and eval.
acceptanceCriteria: Canonicalization and unsafe targets fail closed
Signals and simulated crash recovery restore byte-identical targets and clear state
Same-target contention and different-target concurrency are fixture-tested
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Migrate callers and registries
userStories.description: Update every active caller, registry, provider prompt, cron, workflow, doc, template, and capability task to /audit.
acceptanceCriteria: Before/after active-reference inventory classifies every legacy occurrence
link-providers, skills.lock provenance, REPO_MAP, workflows, docs, templates, and callers use canonical targets
CI and release shellcheck include audit scripts and ablate.sh
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Remove legacy entry points
userStories.description: Delete superseded audit skills and auditor agent only after parent protection ancestry and caller migration are verified.
acceptanceCriteria: Parent PR #648 protected-path commit is in ancestry
Six legacy skill entry points and auditor agent are removed with no aliases
Retained instruments remain public and stale-reference probe reports zero active legacy uses
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Strengthen audit regression probes
userStories.description: Migrate existing probes and add behavior-level coverage for dispatcher, classifier, effects, recovery, and logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Focused probes cover all PRD US-007 fixture cases
Provider-link and wiki-index probes pass
Full eval suite has no new green-to-red regression
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Align changelog and wiki
userStories.description: Document the breaking migration and curate the audit architecture wiki model.
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG has a migration table for every removed invocation
audit-architecture wiki entry follows schema and is indexed
Documentation preserves ownership, effects, readiness, root/run, campaign, and rollback boundaries
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify the complete consolidation
userStories.description: Run all focused and repository-wide gates and capture completion evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: All new shell scripts are executable and shellcheck clean
Focused fixtures, provider links, wiki index, full eval, and git diff checks pass
No active legacy references or unrelated changes remain
Typecheck passes
